textByHash.4c0624bae902c89addecb2be0f126263d61f76d5: Greetings! What can I do for you?
textByHash.e507a738baf0f359337fa4e8c01902f3d16e989d: Of course! Which one would you like?
textByHash.7fc042de1f76fd4a783af64f00af53902a9ad07f: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customise and I'll get things set up for you.
textByHash.00555c21e5708a9e1b54f88f60a6696b5a3d3c2d: Certainly! Let me know which boat you want retrieving and I'll call in a port wizard to teleport it over.
textByHash.2367e0d961a134668dfe367d9ce884601a9523c4: Looks like you have that boat bottled, it's in your Inventory. No need to recover it!
textByHash.b4deed1636d7827da9d5d27428df18ec9df402ef: Looks like you have that boat bottled, it's in your Bank. No need to recover it!
textByHash.e062f5405503dfcd2881b4b9ae1079e264989d54: Right, time to call in the port wizard.
textByHash.711d0f0dfbe06e8028b8ec940304460b06926a1e: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard.
textByHash.107b88b561c7c6dfe216b88427863eed1392feda: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard. However, I'm afraid that because it was lost at sea, the port wizard won't have been able to recover any fish, salvage, crates or bounty parts from your
textByHash.fe55d1e93f8c5d2e64521f8f38ab9a8beb77adef: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard. However, I'm afraid that because it had capsized, the port wizard won't have been able to recover any fish, salvage, crates or bounty parts from
textByHash.4a6e39fab9fa5c9479145dfeaf1fb2da69a530f6: Yes, I can sort that for you. We love a bit of free scrap here.
textByHash.a988024f8bb550822c1229922f3113d6e02ccc8c: There you go. Your boat has been broken up into scrap.
textByHash.7b73d69be2025bc92fc3ac65e83fdca7f476ea7d: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.
textByHash.5d99d7924974d127a107d6ad3a20edae5768006c: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.
textByHash.4408796bc923e9826b8923f11094b4df18594fa1: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
